title: Force Lowercase Commands Maintained
description: Forces Uppercase Commands like /sPawn to be converted to /spawn
body:
![Fabric](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebb1ce019e01e62fe82618584afaea58fae1efdc_0.webp)

This mod automatically converts the command name you type in chat to lowercase before sending it. It only affects the actual command, not the arguments after it.

That means commands like /SPAWN or /Help will still work as /spawn and /help, while anything after the command stays exactly the same.

Examples:


```
/SPAWN → /spawn

/Spawn → /spawn

/HELP SPAWN → /help SPAWN

/Help SPawn → /help SPawn
```


This is useful for players who accidentally use uppercase letters in commands, helping prevent command issues without changing message content or command arguments.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Note: This mod's code was completely custom-made and newly made; none of the code is stolen or taken

</details>
